(2) Secretary to the Government of India, Ministry of Commerce and industry, Department of Commerce (or, his nominee, not below the rank pf Joint Secretary). (3) ~eeretary to the Government of India, Ministry of Food Processing Industries (or, his nominee, not below the rank of Joint Secretary). The Committee rriay also, at its discretion, invite other persons representing Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises, the Central or State Government Ministries or Departments as well as experts in the area of Micro, Small anti Medium Enterprises to its meetings to enable the Committee to discharge its statutory functions.
